---
name: Task / enhancement
about: A scoped piece of work (often a named gap from an ADR)
title: ""
labels: enhancement
---

**What**
<!-- The change in one or two sentences. -->

**Why / which ADR gap**
<!-- Most work maps to a gap an ADR already names, e.g. "ADR 0006 lists delete-vs-edit as unsolved". Link it. -->

**Acceptance criteria**
<!-- How we'll know it's done — ideally a test that proves it. -->

**Pointers**
<!-- Relevant files, e.g. crates/fs/src/filesystem.rs, and anything that constrains the approach. -->
